## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Biologica's content strategy, review Atlas platform, and align on next steps for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas platform demo showcased content generation process, including fact-checking and medical review features](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Content OS introduced with 5 clusters; focus on perimenopause content initially](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Calibration blog post on "perimenopausal anger" ready for review; feedback due by EOD Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Next content piece to focus on an ingredient topic to test dossier referencing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Platform Overview

  - [Recently launched content generation platform by GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Features:](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Canonical AI documents (audience personas, company context, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [Multi-step content creation process: input → assignment brief → research → outline → article draft](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [Automated fact-checking with external link verification](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Medical review flagging system (VR tags)](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Approach

  - [Using SEMrush for keyword research based on identified audience pain points](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Analyzing competitors' content for keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Balancing high-difficulty foundational content with targetable SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [5 content clusters identified: 3 generation-based, ingredients/supplement education, HRT/medication/supplement synergy](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Calibration blog post on "perimenopausal anger" ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Feedback requested on tone, language, approach, and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Comments to be added directly in Google Doc, with overall feedback at the top](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

### AI Content Quality

  - [Artifacts and prompts significantly reduce "AI slop" (90-95% elimination)](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Output quality close to human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Editor still involved to refine and ensure coherence](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Brian to review and provide feedback on calibration blog post by EOD Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Plan to create content calendar for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Next article to focus on an ingredient topic to test dossier referencing](https://fathom.video/share/Uw6ehWKGays4c9AWwooHXkBuNFtAGxZk?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
